To construct a Net Zero Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" with a three-storey plus basement two-unit front building with three parking spaces having vehicular access from the lane.

1. Mechanical unit proposed – Exterior component located in front and rear yards.
2. Schedule B: (Ke Jian Ma) P.Eng (778.877.9016) Structural
3. Schedule B: (Jian Zhong Jin) P.Eng (604.362.7021) Geotechnical
4. HPO: Residential Builder - Glenmark Homes Ltd.

Note: This is a 2 storey building pursuant to the Zoning and Development By-Law
Note: The entire building, INCLUDING THE ATTACHED GARAGE (if applicable), to be sprinklered to NFPA 13D

"Building Permit has been suspended pending the completion of green demolition permit BP-2025-01744."

Address Information:

Principle Dwelling #1: #1 - 3728 W 29th Av
Principle Dwelling #2: #2 - 3728 W 29th Av

Addresses have been assigned per the approved plans, access to the rear unit is from the East side. This access must be provided & maintained at all times and the building addresses posted to be visible from the street in accordance with the Building By-law.

***This permit is issued under the VBBL 2019, with updated energy requirements as per bylaw # 12997 effective Jan 01, 2022.***

description:
Exterior and interior alteration to change the use from this existing Single Detached House to SDH with secondary suite. Scope of work includes new staircase, new exterior stairs, lowering partial area of basement slab.

OK to have rear storage without interconnection and low ceiling height with storage in SS as per Shelley D.

Structural Schedule B provided by Geoff Wensel

Address note: #1 - 2280 Blenheim St – Principal Dwelling (East side 1st Level & 2nd Level)
#2 - 2280 Blenheim St - Secondary Suite (West side 1st Level)

Address has been assigned per the approved plans as the access to the secondary suite is from the west site. This access must be provided & maintained at all times; the address must be posted to be easily visible from the street: AND posted by the suite entry in accordance with the Building by-law.

Note:

- No strata-titling will be permitted.

- This is a two story building pursuant to the Zoning and Development By-law.

- An annual Vancouver Business License must be obtained prior to the rental of this approved single detached house with secondary suite on this site

- Install interconnected, hardwired, 120 volt smoke alarms with battery back-up and silencing feature, in each sleeping unit and within 5m outside each sleeping areas on each storey as per Building Bylaw 9.10.19

- Install Carbon Monoxide Alarm as per Building Bylaw 9.32.4.2 &Bulletin 2007-07-BU/EL

- Upgrade work under Part 11 (base don the value of work - energuide related Part 11.2.1.4)

applicant: John Henshaw DBA: John Henshaw Architect Inc.
description:
To develop a Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" with one three-storey 1 unit front building, one three-storey 2 unit front building, one two-storey one unit rear building and one two storey, two unit rear building; a total of 6 dwelling units and a detached car garage accessed through the lane.

All work is to conform to the archaeological monitoring program identified by Arrowstone Archaeological Research and Consulting Ltd. in the “Interim Results of the Archaeological Impact Assessment (AIA) of a Proposed Multi-Unit (Multiplex) Residential Development at 1688 SW Marine Drive, Vancouver, B.C. within and in proximity to Site DhRs-19.” under Heritage Conservation Act Inspection Permit 2025-0033, Alteration Permit 2025-0274, TWN-24434-24289, MIB-2024-245-AIA, SHIP 2024-299. All subsequent management recommendations resulting from ongoing field results during construction and the testing program must be followed. This may result in amendments to this permit.
